CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Robert Shatzko, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. Pursuant to plaintiff's counsel's representation that the entire case has settled, the Court orders the case set for an OSC re: dismissal per CRC 3.1385 on September 13, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
